sql_array: CREATE TABLE dates_test (id UInt32, event_date Date, event_type String);
INSERT INTO dates_test VALUES (1, toDate('2023-01-01'), 'New Year'), (2, toDate('2023-04-01'), 'April Fool'), (3, toDate('2023-12-31'), 'Year End');
SELECT id, event_date, addQuarters(event_date, 1) AS next_quarter_date FROM dates_test WHERE event_date IN (SELECT event_date FROM dates_test WHERE id = 1);
SELECT id, event_date, addQuarters(event_date, -1) AS prev_quarter_date FROM dates_test WHERE event_type IN ('New Year', 'April Fool') ORDER BY event_date;
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (num UInt32, event_string String);
SELECT num, addQuarters(toDate('2024-01-01'), toUInt32(num)) AS adjusted_date FROM edge_cases WHERE ('2022-01-01' IN (SELECT event_string FROM edge_cases WHERE num = 2));

SELECT id, event_date, addQuarters(event_date, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dates_test)) AS future_date FROM dates_test GROUP BY event_date HAVING future_date IN (toDate('2024-04-01'), addQuarters(event_date, 2));
SELECT event_date, addQuarters(event_date, -1) AS last_quarter FROM dates_test WHERE toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00') IN (SELECT addQuarters(event_date, 1) FROM dates_test) ORDER BY last_quarter;
CREATE TABLE join_test (main_id UInt32, secondary_id UInt32, joining_date Date);
SELECT d.id, addQuarters(j.joining_date, 1) AS new_date FROM dates_test d JOIN join_test j ON d.id = j.main_id WHERE new_date IN (SELECT addQuarters(event_date, 2) FROM dates_test);
SELECT event_date, addQuarters(event_date, 1) AS next_date FROM dates_test GROUP BY event_date HAVING next_date IN (SELECT addQuarters(event_date, 0) FROM dates_test WHERE event_type = 'New Year');
